From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Ramji** may refer to:

* [Ramji (cinematographer)](/wiki/Ramji_(cinematographer) "Ramji (cinematographer)"), Indian film cinematographer
* [Ram G](/wiki/Ram_G "Ram G"), Indian film choreographer and actor
* Ramji, a fictional character in the 2005 Indian film *[Ramji Londonwaley](/wiki/Ramji_Londonwaley "Ramji Londonwaley")*
* Ramji Rao, a fictional character in Indian films including *[Ramji Rao Speaking](/wiki/Ramji_Rao_Speaking "Ramji Rao Speaking")* (1989)
